assumptions.distance: Miles in UI, kilometres inside energy and emissions calculations
assumptions.note: Seed data is intentionally transparent and replaceable. It is designed for portfolio engineering, not vehicle purchase advice.

rag_corpus.title: Project overview and architecture
rag_corpus.content: EV vs ICE Intelligence Lab is a portfolio-grade data product. It combines a Python data pipeline, Pandas data processing, NumPy and SciPy calculations, scikit-learn modelling, SQLite output, Next.js REST API routes, React dashboard components, SEO metadata, and GitHub Actions CI/CD.

rag_corpus.title: Data assumptions and limitations
rag_corpus.content: The seed dataset is a transparent UK demo dataset for engineering demonstration. It models ownership cost, energy cost, maintenance, depreciation, manufacturing emissions, use-phase emissions, grid carbon intensity, and driving mix. It is not vehicle purchase advice.

rag_corpus.title: Tesla Model 3 RWD 2024
rag_corpus.content: Tesla Model 3 RWD is a UK market 2024 compact-executive EV trim using electricity. Purchase price is GBP 39990. Efficiency is 14.4 kwh_per_100km. Manufacturing emissions are 9800 kgCO2e and annual maintenance is GBP 360.

rag_corpus.title: Scenario: City commuter
rag_corpus.content: The City commuter scenario uses 8000 annual miles over 4 years with 68 percent urban driving and 14 percent motorway driving. Grid intensity is 95.0 gCO2e/kWh. Weighted electricity price is GBP 0.28 per kWh. The lowest-cost trim is Dacia Sandero TCe 90 Essential at GBP 0.395 per mile. The lowest lifecycle emissions trim is Fiat 500e La Prima 42kWh at 8.25 tonnes CO2e.

rag_corpus.title: Scenario: Mixed household
rag_corpus.content: The Mixed household scenario uses 12000 annual miles over 5 years with 42 percent urban driving and 34 percent motorway driving. Grid intensity is 95.0 gCO2e/kWh. Weighted electricity price is GBP 0.416 per kWh. The lowest-cost trim is Dacia Sandero TCe 90 Essential at GBP 0.293 per mile. The lowest lifecycle emissions trim is Fiat 500e La Prima 42kWh at 8.88 tonnes CO2e.

rag_corpus.title: Scenario: High mileage fleet
rag_corpus.content: The High mileage fleet scenario uses 22000 annual miles over 4 years with 28 percent urban driving and 56 percent motorway driving. Grid intensity is 88.0 gCO2e/kWh. Weighted electricity price is GBP 0.436 per kWh. The lowest-cost trim is Dacia Sandero TCe 90 Essential at GBP 0.244 per mile. The lowest lifecycle emissions trim is Fiat 500e La Prima 42kWh at 9.42 tonnes CO2e.

rag_corpus.title: Scenario: Public charging renter
rag_corpus.content: The Public charging renter scenario uses 10000 annual miles over 5 years with 50 percent urban driving and 28 percent motorway driving. Grid intensity is 95.0 gCO2e/kWh. Weighted electricity price is GBP 0.644 per kWh. The lowest-cost trim is Dacia Sandero TCe 90 Essential at GBP 0.328 per mile. The lowest lifecycle emissions trim is Fiat 500e La Prima 42kWh at 8.65 tonnes CO2e.

rag_corpus.title: Scenario: 2030 decarbonised grid
rag_corpus.content: The 2030 decarbonised grid scenario uses 12000 annual miles over 7 years with 38 percent urban driving and 36 percent motorway driving. Grid intensity is 55.0 gCO2e/kWh. Weighted electricity price is GBP 0.346 per kWh. The lowest-cost trim is Dacia Sandero TCe 90 Essential at GBP 0.275 per mile. The lowest lifecycle emissions trim is Fiat 500e La Prima 42kWh at 8.65 tonnes CO2e.

rag_corpus.title: Diesel summary for city_commuter
rag_corpus.content: In scenario city_commuter, Diesel vehicles average GBP 0.836 per mile, GBP 26735.063 total cost, 15.622 tonnes lifecycle CO2e, and GBP 1015.533 annual energy cost.

rag_corpus.title: EV summary for city_commuter
rag_corpus.content: In scenario city_commuter, EV vehicles average GBP 0.815 per mile, GBP 26069.615 total cost, 10.791 tonnes lifecycle CO2e, and GBP 550.356 annual energy cost.

rag_corpus.title: Petrol summary for city_commuter
rag_corpus.content: In scenario city_commuter, Petrol vehicles average GBP 0.66 per mile, GBP 21116.53 total cost, 14.175 tonnes lifecycle CO2e, and GBP 1123.943 annual energy cost.

rag_corpus.title: Petrol Hybrid summary for city_commuter
rag_corpus.content: In scenario city_commuter, Petrol Hybrid vehicles average GBP 0.642 per mile, GBP 20553.51 total cost, 13.192 tonnes lifecycle CO2e, and GBP 915.76 annual energy cost.

rag_corpus.content: In scenario decarbonised_2030, Diesel vehicles average GBP 0.505 per mile, GBP 42439.473 total cost, 28.863 tonnes lifecycle CO2e, and GBP 1489.248 annual energy cost.

rag_corpus.title: Signal processing over driving cycles
rag_corpus.content: SciPy signal processing smooths speed traces and extracts acceleration, deceleration, jerk RMS, stop share, and energy stress features. mixed has energy stress 71.1 and stop share 15.0 percent; motorway has energy stress 91.1 and stop share 20.0 percent; urban has energy stress 51.0 and stop share 35.0 percent.

rag_corpus.title: Machine learning cost model
rag_corpus.content: The ML model predicts total cost per mile using a scikit-learn RandomForestRegressor. It trains on 37200 synthetic scenario rows and evaluates on 8928 test rows. R2 is 0.999 and MAE is GBP 0.005 per mile. Top features are annual_miles (0.685), purchase_price_gbp (0.2222), ownership_years (0.0749), annual_maintenance_gbp (0.0046), weighted_electricity_gbp_per_kwh (0.0032), efficiency_value (0.0029).

rag_corpus.title: Agentic RAG advisor design
rag_corpus.content: The Agentic RAG Advisor classifies a user query, chooses a scenario, retrieves relevant corpus documents, runs deterministic vehicle comparison calculations, selects a recommendation, and returns reasoning steps with citations. The design is local and explainable, with a clear upgrade path to vector search and LLM-generated reports.

source_registry.conflict_policy: Keep all source values and label conflicts rather than overwriting.
Compare overlapping values with the selected catalog trim and return both values.

source_registry.source_name: DVSA MOT history and anonymised test data
source_registry.conflict_policy: Use as supporting evidence for usage and model text, not as trim authority.
Compare CO2 values by source and preserve disagreements.
